name: CodeHighlight
description: Highlight code with shiki or highlight.js
searchText: codehighlight highlight code with shiki or highlight.js @mantine/code-highlight /x/code-highlight background code codecolorscheme collapsecodelabel controls copiedlabel copylabel defaultexpanded expandcodelabel expanded language maxcollapsedheight onexpandedchange radius withborder withcopybutton withexpandbutton activetab background code codecolorscheme collapsecodelabel controls copiedlabel copylabel defaultactivetab defaultexpanded expandcodelabel expanded getfileicon maxcollapsedheight onexpandedchange ontabchange radius withborder withcopybutton withexpandbutton background code language radius withborder

props.name: background
props.description: Controls background color of the code. By default, the value depends on color scheme.

props.name: code
props.description: Code to highlight

props.name: codeColorScheme
props.description: Set to use dark or light color scheme. When using shiki adapter, you can use loaded themes here

props.name: collapseCodeLabel
props.description: Label for collapse button

props.name: controls
props.description: Extra controls to display in the controls list

props.name: copiedLabel
props.description: Label for copy button in copied state

props.name: copyLabel
props.description: Label for copy button in default state

props.name: defaultExpanded
props.description: Uncontrolled expanded default state

props.name: expandCodeLabel
props.description: Label for expand button

props.name: expanded
props.description: Controlled expanded state

props.name: language
props.description: Language of the code, used for syntax highlighting

props.name: maxCollapsedHeight
props.description: Max height of collapsed state

props.name: onExpandedChange
props.description: Called when expanded state changes

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius

props.name: withBorder
props.description: Adds border to the root element

props.name: withCopyButton
props.description: Determines whether the copy button should be displayed

props.name: withExpandButton
props.description: Determines whether the expand/collapse button should be displayed

props.name: activeTab
props.description: Index of controlled active tab state
